title: Emoji Character Counter
desc: Emoji Character Counter - a handy browser-based tool.

title: Instagram Character Counter
desc: Count characters for Instagram captions, bios, names, and hashtags instantly. Track limits, word counts, and hashtag usage with a live progress bar for optimal posting.

title: Social Media Image Size Guide
desc: Get the latest image dimensions for Instagram, Facebook, X, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn. A quick reference guide for profile photos, covers, posts, and stories to ensure perfect formatting.

title: TikTok Hashtag Generator
desc: Boost your TikTok reach with this free hashtag generator. Create optimized, trending, and niche-specific tags for cooking, fitness, beauty, and more to grow your audience.

title: X Character Counter
desc: Accurately count characters for X (Twitter) posts with real-time weighted counting. Handles URLs, emojis, and CJK characters to ensure your tweets stay within the 280-character limit.

title: YouTube Title Generator
desc: Boost your YouTube CTR with clickable, SEO-optimized titles. Generate engaging video titles based on your topic and style to increase views and rankings instantly.

title: LinkedIn Character Counter
desc: Check character counts for LinkedIn posts, headlines, and summaries. Get real-time limits, word counts, reading time, and platform-specific optimization tips.

title: Twitter Card Generator
desc: Generate Twitter Card meta tags (summary, summary_large_image, player, app). Preview how your links appear on X/Twitter. Free Twitter Card generator.
